codeReview.summary: The feature stays within the parser-only mission boundary and the reviewed commit exposes the required outward-facing pending identity surface. PendingObjectKind and dispatch_object agree for each bucket, ParsedRecordSummary carries section/record/payload provenance, synthetic handles are deterministic and duplicate-free for the covered fixtures, and owner_handle remains externally visible with null-owner behavior preserved.

summary: Reviewed the worker transcript skeleton, handoff, shared-state docs, and commit baa8770f75ab919ba1d6dd69c1107283bd7cbece. The implementation satisfies VAL-PENDING-004/005/006/007 with parser-local code and regression coverage, and I found no blocking or non-blocking correctness issues for this feature.
